sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67269" key="metw/numos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετώνῠμ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">connected with a change of name</tr_>, cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
